title: lithocarpus oleifolius
intro: Lithocarpus oleifolius, also known as the Taiwan corktree or Taiwanese Lithocarpus, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus oleifolius include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Lithocarpus oleifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, though more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
